data.description:
# Align held-out schema compatibility coverage

## Problem
Merged story 5967-4476-7f9f-442d intentionally made `review_phase` required in `plan_review_precheck_output`, but `tests/unit/workflow/test_plan_review_hierarchy_incomplete.py::test_precheck_output_schema_accepts_old_and_new_shapes` still constructs both valid shapes without that required field. The full non-integration suite therefore fails after the schema cutover.

## Implementation
Update the shared base fixture in that test to include `review_phase: planning`. Preserve its actual contract: hierarchy_incomplete and hierarchy_incomplete_detail remain optional additive fields, while review_phase remains required.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The test proves both pre- and post-hierarchy-extension shapes validate when they satisfy the current required review_phase contract.
- [ ] Removing review_phase from either shape still fails schema validation.
- [ ] The focused test and full non-integration suite pass.

## Verification
Run pytest -q tests/unit/workflow/test_plan_review_hierarchy_incomplete.py and the non-integration suite.
data.title: Update hierarchy precheck test for required review phase
